channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics

item.title: Lombardo's crime bill focuses on harsher penalties in Nevada, penalizing repeat offenders
item.description: Republican Nevada Gov. Joe Lombardo is proposing harsher penalties for repeat offenders, DUI drivers and other criminals as part of his sweeping crime bill introduced Monday.
item.dc:creator: David Charns, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Trump crypto chief says we are in the 'golden age' for digital assets, 'clearing the deck' of Biden barriers
item.description: EXCLUSIVE: President Trump wants to make the United States the “crypto capital of the world," and a top White House cryptocurrency policy official told Fox News Digital the administration is well on its way to ushering in “the golden age for digital assets.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Photos: 'Jackson Magnolia' removed at White House, replaced with descendant sapling
item.description: The newest greenery added to the White House grounds came the day after one of the southern magnolia trees was removed due to "serious safety concerns.
item.dc:creator: Judy Kurtz, NewsNation

item.title: House Republicans and Democrats say the US must maintain its troop totals in Europe
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Republican and Democratic members of the House Armed Services Committee voiced sharp bipartisan criticism Tuesday about reports the Trump administration is eyeing a reduction of U.S. forces in Europe, saying America must stick with its NATO allies. Rep. Michael Rogers, R-Mich.
item.dc:creator: LOLITA C. BALDOR, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Trump's nominee for ambassador to the Vatican defends recent cuts to US foreign aid
item.description: President Donald Trump’s nominee for ambassador to the Vatican has defended many of the administration’s foreign-aid cuts at a Senate hearing, even while saying Catholic charitable groups are well-equipped to deliver such aid efficiently.
item.dc:creator: Peter Smith, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Trump meets with the House GOP as his 'big' bill of tax breaks and spending cuts teeters
item.description: House Speaker Mike Johnson finds himself in a familiar jam, with conservative Republican holdouts stalling action on President Donald Trump’s “big” bill of tax breaks and spending reductions.
item.dc:creator: Lisa Mascaro And Kevin Freking, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Trump admin unveils plan costing migrants massive fine for every day they don't self-deport
item.description: The Trump administration is planning to issue a daily fine of nearly $1,000 to illegal immigrants who do not self-deport after receiving final orders to leave the country.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Supreme Court blocks order requiring Trump administration to reinstate thousands of federal workers
item.description: The Supreme Court has blocked an order for the Trump administration to return to work thousands of federal employees who were let go in mass firings aimed at dramatically downsizing the federal government.
item.dc:creator: Mark Sherman, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Jeffries claims Trump budget bill will steal food from 'the mouths of babies' while enriching billionaires
item.description: House Minority Leader Hakeem Jeffries claimed a Trump-backed budget bill would take food from the mouths of babies will enriching billionaires.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Elon Musk calls Navarro 'moron' after 'false' claims about Tesla
item.description: Tech billionaire Elon Musk slammed President Trump's trade Peter Navarro on Tuesday, calling him "truly a moron.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, NewsNation

item.title: Popular former Republican governor whom Trump urged to run for NH Senate makes 2026 decision
item.description: Former New Hampshire Republican Gov. Chris Sununu ruled out a 2026 Senate run for a seat the GOP is targeting to flip from blue to red.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: China vows retaliation and a 'fight to the end' after Trump's latest tariff threat
item.description: Trump said on Truth Social he would impose the new tariffs on China if Beijing did not retract a 34% retaliatory tariff on U.S. goods that it announced in response to Trump's initial salvo last Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: John Ruwitch, MPR News

item.title: New Navy chief 'regrets' costly missile interceptors against Houthis, pushes for cheaper Red Sea defense
item.description: Adm. James Kilby says expensive Red Sea missile defenses are not sustainable and calls on the military-industrial base to speed up cheaper munitions production.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Judge Boasberg cancels planned hearing to review Trump deportations
item.description: A federal judge has canceled a planned hearing on the Trump administration's use of an 18th-century law to deport foreign nationals after the Supreme Court ruled in favor of the president.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Spanberger raises $6.7 million in Virginia governor race
item.description: Former Rep. Abigail Spanberger’s (D-Va.) gubernatorial campaign said Monday it raised $6.7 million in the first quarter of the year. The haul included more than 50,000 donations of $100 or less in the first three months of the year, according to the Spanberger campaign.
item.dc:creator: Julia Manchester, NewsNation

item.title: Dow jumps 1,300 points at open, rebounding amid China tariff tension
item.description: Many are waiting to see if the nation’s three major indices take any hits from the escalating trade tension between China and the U.S.
item.dc:creator: Alicia Nieves, NewsNation

item.title: Gabbard establishes new intelligence community task force to restore transparency
item.description: EXCLUSIVE: Director of National Intelligence Tulsi Gabbard established a new task force to restore transparency and accountability in the intelligence community, Fox News Digital has learned.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Trump admin fires Navy admiral at NATO targeted by conservative group
item.description: The Trump administration has sacked a senior NATO official who was recommended by a conservative research group to be fired as part of a broader effort to purge of wokeness from the Pentagon.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: National Democrats to target GOP Rep. Monica De La Cruz’s South Texas district in 2026
item.description: The battlefield for both parties is again converging on South Texas, where De La Cruz scored one of the GOP’s high-profile wins last year when she secured a second term.
item.dc:creator: Texas Tribune, By Jasper Scherer, KPRC 2

item.title: Trump says he's not backing down, calls tariffs 'medicine' as markets reel
item.description: Speaking to reporters aboard Air Force One, Trump said he didn't want global markets to fall, but also that he wasn't concerned about the massive sell-off either.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Trump backs Luna push for House parental proxy voting
item.description: Speaker Mike Johnson (R-La.) has been scrambling to break an impasse over the push for proxy voting, after Luna joined with more than 200 Democrats and nine Republicans to use a procedure known as a discharge petition to circumvent leadership and force a vote on the matter.
item.dc:creator: Emily Brooks, Fox 5
